next_experiment: Attack K=57 first on even N with an odd prime divisor at most 103, then isolate the 103-rough remainder.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: No pointwise residual estimate K=57, K=56, or otherwise is proved. The theorem only weakens the sufficient analytic target on named arithmetic strata; the 103-rough remainder still includes powers of two.
